title: The Alchemist
author: Paulo Coelho
description: A timeless novel about Santiago, a young shepherd who journeys for treasure. Along the way, he learns destiny, courage, and self-discovery. A story about following dreams and trusting life.

title: Atomic Habits
author: James Clear
description: A practical guide to building good habits through small daily changes. James Clear explains how tiny improvements create big results. Full of useful strategies for growth.

title: The Silent Patient
author: Alex Michaelides
description: A gripping thriller about Alicia, who kills her husband and never speaks again. A therapist becomes obsessed with her silence. Full of suspense and shocking twists.

title: The Power of Habit
author: Charles Duhigg
description: This book explains why habits form and how they can change. It introduces the cue-routine-reward loop clearly. Great for improving life and productivity.

title: Sapiens: A Brief History of Humankind
author: Yuval Noah Harari
description: A fascinating history of humans from ancient times to today. Explores culture, science, and ideas that shaped the world. Thought-provoking and insightful.

title: A Brief History of Time
author: Stephen Hawking
description: Stephen Hawking explains space, time, black holes, and the Big Bang simply. Makes complex science easy to enjoy. A classic for curious readers.

title: Thinking, Fast and Slow
author: Daniel Kahneman
description: Explains how the mind uses fast and slow thinking systems. Reveals common biases in judgment. Helpful for smarter decisions.

title: Clean Code
author: Robert C. Martin
description: A famous programming book about writing clean and readable code. Shares best practices with examples. Essential for serious developers.

title: Eloquent JavaScript
author: Marijn Haverbeke
description: An engaging guide to JavaScript and modern programming concepts. Covers functions, DOM, async coding, and Node.js. Great for learners.

author: George Orwell
description: A powerful dystopian novel about surveillance and oppression. Winston Smith secretly rebels against the regime. A warning about freedom and truth.

title: Python Crash Course
author: Eric Matthes
description: A beginner-friendly guide to learning Python with practice. Covers basics and real-world projects. Perfect for starting coding.

title: Deep Learning
author: Ian Goodfellow
description: A complete textbook on deep learning by leading AI researchers. Covers math, neural networks, and advanced models. Best for serious learners.
